name: Rhubarb Jelly
recipeIngredient: 1 small package of any flavor Jell-O
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the rhubarb and sugar in a large bowl until combined.
2. Cover the mixture and refrigerate overnight.
3. In the morning, bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
4. Boil for 10 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the Jell-O according to package instructions.
6. Pour the mixture into clean containers and seal tightly.
